name: claude-tiktok
description: Plays a TikTok-voice spoken summary of Claude's last message when it stops or needs your input. Replaces the usual silence / terminal bell with a short, annoying soundbite announcing what's being asked.

api_key.title: Anthropic API key
api_key.description: Used for Haiku summarization. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com and load prepaid credits — Haiku 4.5 costs ~$0.0002 per summary. Billed separately from your Claude Code subscription.
